feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Not just a useless human (English version)
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,431Chapters: 11/18Kudos: 0

Summary: Stiles Stilinski is alone. Scott abandoned him to join Derek's pack, and he's not welcome. He tries to build a new life, but trouble seems to be targeting him even though he's cut ties with the supernatural. Alpha packs, serial killers, and now a disease he hoped he wouldn't have. Stiles will soon discover that everything he knew about himself was a lie.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Stiles Stilinski

entry.title: [Podfic] Trading Up
entry.summary:
Author: whimsicalmeerkat

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Stiles is turning away from the stationery store he and his (maybe) girlfriend have been looking in to follow her to the next window when she softly says “Daaaamn” and steps three feet to the side, dropping his hand in the process. Confused, he looks over and follows her eyes to a man she’s staring at with a look on her face she’s definitely never directed at Stiles. ~ Stiles has to watch his date flirting with the most handsome man he’s ever seen. The story ends differently than he expects.Podfic of Trading Up by whimsicalmeerkat.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: [Podfic] The Moon Gave Me Permission
entry.summary:
Author: whimsicalmeerkat

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16Chapters: 1/9Kudos: 1

Summary: “I probably shouldn’t tell you this,” Scott says, eyeing Stiles’ fries. “But Derek Hale is back in town. I saw him at the gas station the other day.” This piques Stiles’ interest. Oh yes it does. Like any good true crime aficionado, Stiles has his favourite case. His pet cold case. His hometown murder. The thing he brings up when he’s tired of small talk and just wants to get real. The Hale Family Fire and the suicide of Katherine Argent. Stiles knows this case inside and out. He’s racked up thousands of karma points on reddit for his thoughtful analysis, his pictures of the crime scene, and of his reporting of local gossip. Beacon Hills is a small town, small enough that Stiles is the only one on the Unresolved Mysteries subreddit to have actually seen the burnt out shell in person. No one knows this case like Stiles does. - In which Derek Hale is a man with a dark past, and Stiles is completely obsessed with him. Podfic of The Moon Gave Me Permission by Melpomene (Aconitehart).

entry.title: comfort person
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,828Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 92

Summary: The wolf leaves the desk immediately and goes to Stiles, crouching down on the floor and bringing a hand up to cup the boy’s face. Stiles leans into Derek’s palm, looking on the verge of tears from the relief of his touch. “Did you drive here yourself?” Derek murmurs softly, stroking Stiles’ cheek with his thumb. Stiles’ own fingers loop around Derek’s wrist to keep him where he is. “Yeah,” he says, voice rough and low. “Dad was working in the next city over. Scott didn’t pick up. It was you I wanted anyway.”   Or, 5 times Derek and Stiles are each other’s comfort person, and one time they’re more.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Starks Three Son's
entry.summary:
Author: FastFadingFiction

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,288Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 55

Summary: After Obadiah Stane dies, Pepper Potts finds a box of files that should never have existed. Stark has three boys hidden from him for years because Stane refused to let Tony have heirs. Peter Parker is still just a brilliant kid from Queens. Harley Keener is smart enough for MIT and too broke to get there. Stiles Stilinski is already neck-deep in the supernatural, dating Derek Hale, and absolutely unimpressed by Tony Stark showing up and announcing he’s his biological father. Tony can’t undo the years he lost. The only thing left to do is show up now

entry.title: A Very Stilinski Affair
entry.summary:
Author: Christina786

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,657Chapters: 3/14Kudos: 5

Summary: Derek frowned. “You Stilinskis really have to be that honest?”She shrugged. “What’s the point in being secretive and mysterious?”Now Derek grinned “Oh, you should meet my uncle, you’d hate him.” This is based on a post on tumblr in which Stiles is afraid that Derek might fall for his sibling once he meets them. It kind of got out of hand and I started indulging in some morally gray but not evil Peter. Basically, Peter falls for Stiles' sister instead, because they kind of bond over their different but slightly similar traumas and it turns out Stiles' sister has been hiding a few bodies in her closet.

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski Is Not OKay
entry.summary:
Author: GhastlyHollow

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,342Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 8

Summary: Kicked out of the pack with no friends and no one to turn to, Stiles Stilinski uses the isolation to focus on herself especially now that strange supernatural changes are happening to her body. Haunted by nightmares of the Nemeton and visions of her dead mother, Stiles struggles to figure out what’s real and what isn’t as her reality begins to collapse.Meanwhile, killings start up again in Beacon Hills, and the arrival of a new alpha pack immediately raises red flags definitely not giving Deucalion 2.0 vibes… at all.As tensions rise and old alliances fall apart, Stiles finds herself uncovering a much darker truth hiding beneath it all.And through everything, through the danger, the isolation, and the fear of what she might be becoming she’s still hopelessly, painfully in love with one sour wolf.

entry.title: No One Will Find You
entry.summary:
Author: Hedwig221b

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,877Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 401

Summary: Stiles' gaze fell on the ads and random bits of paper stuck to the street pole. He ripped the offending advertisement off and was about to throw it out when his eyes caught a familiar face. Closely shorn head. Big, doe eyes, an impish smile, and his mother’s nose. Stiles stared at himself, black and white and frozen above giant letters, which spelled a bold “MISSING”.

entry.title: The Butterfly Effect
entry.summary:
Author: Hockey_Lover31

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,391Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 590

Summary: The Butterfly Effect: The idea that small changes in initial conditions can lead to vastly different outcomes in complex, dynamic systems. What happens when Harry Potter, a small three year old whose selectively mute and diagnosed to be highly autistic, is found by Sheriff Noah Stilinski one night, three years before the events of Season 1. If just one flap of a butterfly wing can cause a tornado, what can a Reincarnated Master of Death who longs for a family and will protect them no matter the cost, as much as his mind and body can handle, stumble upon a world filled with were-creatures, hunters, and a feral werewolf whose family and bonds were burned? Well, he might just have to protect his older brother, who threw himself and his best friend Scott into a world he didn't understand. And if along the way they happen to adopt a whole bunch of werewolves, a werecoyate, and a kitsune, well, he supposes his family just got a bit bigger.

entry.title: My mother cursed Derek (english version)
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,691Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Stiles is tired of always being the second best, never anyone's priority. He loves Derek madly, and because of this unrequited feeling, he decides to cast a spell to erase all the emotional attachment he had. Mother Claudia, a ghost who haunts her child, decides to curse Derek.

entry.title: said goodbye to my virtue: heaven only knows how i've longed for you
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,900Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 31

Summary: “What's wrong.” Despite being a question, Derek says it like a statement. There’s this thin edge of long suffering, of please don’t actually tell me attached as Derek stares blank faced at the beer bottle between his fingers—like the last thing Derek wants to do while lounging model perfect in the dirt with his stupid lumberjack flannel is entertain the drunken musings of a hyperactive teenager who can’t stop wiggling around on a tree stump, despite a bunch of teenagers being here on Derek’s behest. Whatever, dude. Derek can pretend all he wants, but he likes them. Derek waits: there's plenty of snarky things he could say, could even go so far as to make up some problem—but, instead, he says: “I’m kinda... horny. I think. From the alcohol, maybe? It’s, weird.” He doesn't register any of this as inherently weird ’til Derek whips his head up. He could smack himself. Jesus fucking Christ, Stiles.Stiles is of the opinion that a good pack alpha lends a helping hand when it's needed, and Derek's never had a good track record for that kind of thing, so—pardon him if he's a bit... surprised.

entry.title: The Bonds that Bind
entry.summary:
Author: applejuice382

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 346,200Chapters: 23/25Kudos: 1,794

Summary: Stiles is just trying to prevent the next supernatural problem from killing his friends. Derek is just trying to keep his pack alive (and ignore the desperation that crawls under his skin whenever Stiles is near). When Stiles goes into the preserve to investigate a string of murders, he and Derek are kidnapped by an unknown group and locked in a basement with no escape. Each night brings new suffering, and each day they have only each other. The two will have to learn how to lean on one another to keep their sanity intact, and they’ll have to work together to escape. Too bad they annoy the shit out of each other.

entry.summary:
Author: Stout

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,005Chapters: 5/9Kudos: 40

Summary: After making several mistakes in a row, Stiles finds himself stuck in a haunted manor the middle of a cursed wood, and faced with a terrifying, monstrous Beast demanding custody of whatever creature first greets Stiles at his front gate in exchange for Stiles' freedom. entry.title: Surviving High School Is Hard
entry.summary:
Author: DreamingOfSummer

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,932Chapters: 1/12Kudos: 10
